technical.lead: Mag 7 earnings week opens Apr 27 with Iran/Hormuz tension cooling tape
technical.body: Alphabet/Amazon/Meta/Microsoft report Apr 29, Apple Apr 30, all up >10% MTD into prints — — Apr 27 futures slip on a fresh Strait of Hormuz escalation: Dow Futures -0.17% (49,306), S&P -0.09%, Nasdaq -0.03%. Five of the Mag 7 print this week, with combined Q1 capex commentary from Meta ($115B-$135B 2026 guide), Amazon (~$200B AWS-AI plan), and Alphabet ($175B-$185B) framed as the — AI ROI reckoning — — narrative shifts from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." Fed leaves rates unchanged this week (100% odds). — ****

technical.lead: Hermes Agent v0.11.0 "Interface" (Apr 23) lands with full React/Ink TUI rewrite, native AWS Bedrock, GPT-5.5 via Codex OAuth
technical.body: 1,556 commits / 761 PRs / 224K insertions / 29 contributors — — Nous Research ships its largest update yet: pluggable transport architecture under every provider, — 5 new inference paths — , 17th messaging platform (QQBot), shell hooks (pre/post tool call, on_session_start), webhook direct-delivery zero-LLM mode, configurable max_spawn_depth subagent orchestrator, file-coordination layer for concurrent siblings. By Apr 23 traction over 95,600 GitHub stars in 7 weeks. Tool-gateway runtime patterns now stable. — ****

technical.lead: Inference-runtime + CI/CD CVE wave continues: CVE-2026-7037 Totolink RCE (CVSS 9.8, Apr 26, public exploit) + CVE-2026-6951 simple-git RCE (CVSS 9.8, Apr 26, foundational CI dependency) + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 still unpatched
technical.body: Apr 26 daily roll-up: — 31 high-priority + 19 actively exploited + simple-git RCE in widely-deployed Node.js CI/CD library — + — Totolink A8000RU pptpPassThru OS-command injection with public PoC** + Apr 27 LogonTracer CVE-2026-33277 (CVSS 8.8) + Apr 27 GeoVision GV-IP Device Utility credential leak (CVE-2026-42363, CVSS 9.3). SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI **remains unpatched** post-disclosure window.******

technical.lead: Sam Altman vs Anthropic on Claude Mythos "fear-based marketing"
technical.body: public-opinion sour heading into IPO season — — Apr 21 Altman likens Mythos rollout to "selling a bomb shelter while threatening to drop a bomb"; debate intensifies through Apr 26 against backdrop of — physical attacks on Altman's home (Apr 16) — , — Mythos-leak via Discord/contractor URL-guessing**, and Apr 15 CNBC public-opinion data on AI/datacenter blowback. **Project Glasswing** roster confirmed at 12 launch partners (AWS, Apple, Broadcom, Cisco, CrowdStrike, Google, JPMorganChase, Linux Foundation, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Palo Alto Networks, Anthropic) + 40 critical-infrastructure orgs.******

technical.lead: SF AI Conference Season opens Apr 28-29
technical.body: AI Dev 26 at Pier 48 (3,000+ devs, Andrew Ng-hosted) + AI Tinkerers "Building Software Factories" VIP Dinner with Kiro & B-Capital (Apr 29) — — DeepLearning.AI's flagship SF event lands at Pier 48 Mission Bay covering Agentic AI, Context Engineering, Multimodal Apps, AI Governance, Coding-with-AI; AI Tinkerers' invite-only dinner pairs Kiro Power's SDK with B-Capital's VC perspective on the "software factory" thesis. Stanford follow-up: Causal Science Frontiers in AI Evaluation Apr 29 + CORES Symposium May 5 + SaaStr Annual May 12-14 + AI DevSummit May 27-28.
